iframes.title: _hjSafeContext
iframes.style: display: none !important; width: 1px !important; height: 1px !important; opacity: 0 !important; pointer-events: none !important;

iframes.name: chat-widget

iframes.style: width: 100%; height: 100%; min-height: 0px; min-width: 0px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; background-image: none; background-position: 0% 0%; background-size: initial; background-attachment: scroll; background-origin: initial; background-clip: initial; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); border-width: 0px; float: none; color-scheme: light; position: absolute; inset: 0px; transition: none !important; display: none; visibility: hidden;
